title: ChocoCow HUD
description: Soft pack that transforms your HUD and menu with a charming cow-spot theme. Features a gentle chocolate and cream color palette mooo-gic!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4750be9fe9f0f06be93395d87a708d9dd96d7fd3.png) *** ### **Features:**
Hotbar - grassy slots in white and chocolate pallete
Selection Slot - spoted frame with cow face and daisies
Health - pastel hearts
Hunger - an ear of wheat
Experience Bar - orange & green string
Armor - daisies
Menu buttons - cow-themed textures in chocolate palette
*** ### **Support & Contact:** Love this pack? Support me on [Boosty](https://boosty.to/reterica)!
For any questions or suggestions, reach me out via my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/QsezmMbPQF)
